---
title: "ANOVA Analysis Report"
subtitle: "Statistical Results & Visualizations"
author: "Rscience"
date: today
format:
 html:
   embed-resources: true
   theme: flatly
   echo: false
   warning: false
   message: false
   page-layout: full
---

```{r setup}
library(knitr)
library(DT)
library(ggplot2)
library(plotly)

# Rutas y Carga de Objetos
str_input_folder_path <- "../../zzz_zzz_output"
str_file_name_RData_internal <- "zzz_output_f03_RData.RData"
str_file_path_RData_internal <- file.path(str_input_folder_path, str_file_name_RData_internal)

if(file.exists(str_file_path_RData_internal)) {
 load(str_file_path_RData_internal)
}
```

::: {.column-screen-inset}
## Resultados Principales {.tabset .panel-tabset}

### 📈 Gráfico Interactivo

```{r}
#| out-width: "100%"
if(exists("plot_box")) {
 ggplotly(plot_box, height = 600) |> 
   layout(margin = list(t = 50, b = 50))
}
```

### 📊 Tabla de Percentiles

```{r}
if(exists("df_percentiles")) {
 datatable(df_percentiles, 
           filter = 'top', 
           extensions = 'Buttons',
           options = list(
             pageLength = 15, 
             scrollX = TRUE,
             dom = 'Bfrtip',
             buttons = c('copy', 'csv', 'excel')
           ),
           class = 'cell-border stripe')
}
```

### 🧪 Comparaciones Tukey

```{r}
if(exists("df_stats_rv")) {
 datatable(df_stats_rv, 
           options = list(pageLength = 15, scrollX = TRUE),
           class = 'hover order-column')
}
```

:::

---

<div style="text-align: center; color: gray; font-size: 0.8em;">
 Reporte generado automáticamente por Rscience Pipeline. 
 Este documento es autocontenido y no requiere conexión a base de datos.
</div>
